generated_oml:
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor encoder measuring position of the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorEncoderDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorEncoderDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
    base:desc "Real-time position data from motor encoder transmitted via MQTT protocol"
]

instance SecondaryPositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary position encoder behind the gearbox of the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SecondaryPositionEncoderDataTransmitted
]

instance SecondaryPositionEncoderDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryPositionEncoder
    base:desc "Real-time position data from secondary position encoder behind gearbox transmitted via MQTT protocol"
]

instance CurrentSensorIM : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor measuring motor current (I_M) for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CurrentSensorIMDataTransmitted
]

instance CurrentSensorIMDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensorIM
    base:desc "Real-time motor current (I_M) data transmitted via MQTT protocol"
]

instance MotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Position data from motor encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler, SysMLEnabler
]

instance SecondaryPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Position data from secondary position encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SecondaryPositionEncoderDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler, SysMLEnabler
]

instance CurrentIData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured motor current (I_M) from current sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentSensorIMDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance AngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular velocity derived from position data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler, SysMLEnabler
]

instance TorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Torque derived from current data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentSensorIMDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance SimulatedTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated torque data from friction models"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentSensorIMDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DashboardEnabler
]

instance SimulatedAngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated angular velocity from friction models"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DashboardEnabler
]

instance SysMLBDDModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram for first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance SysMLIBDModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram for first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance SimulinkMotorModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model of permanent magnet synchronous motor for first axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance SimulinkGearwheelModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model of gearwheel for first axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance SimulinkGearboxModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model of cycloidal gearbox for first axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Coulomb-Viscous friction model for first axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Stribeck friction model for first axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance DahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dahl friction model for first axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "LuGre friction model for first axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance SysMLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML modeling tool for structural models"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelIdentificationService, MultiPhysicsAnalysisService
]

instance MATLABSimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks MATLAB Simulink for simulation models"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelIdentificationService, MultiPhysicsAnalysisService
]

instance AssetAdministrationShellEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell for digital twin integration"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelIdentificationService, DashboardVisualizationService
]

instance MQTTProtocolEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time sensor data transmission"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelIdentificationService, DashboardVisualizationService
]

instance DashboardEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization tool for robot motion analysis"
    DTDFVocab:enables DashboardVisualizationService
]

instance FrictionModelIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous identification of white-box and black-box friction models using live data"
    DTDFVocab:provides JointFrictionDynamicsInsight
]

instance MultiPhysicsAnalysisService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Multi-physics-aware analysis of robot joint dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:provides JointFrictionDynamicsInsight
]

instance DashboardVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Integrated dashboard visualization for improving robot motion accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:provides JointFrictionDynamicsInsight
]

instance JointFrictionDynamicsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights into joint friction dynamics for informing control algorithms to improve robot motion accuracy"
]

instance FirstAxis : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "First axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot consisting of permanent magnet synchronous motor, gearwheel, cycloidal gearbox, motor and secondary position encoders, controlled by Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC system for machining applications."
]

instance RobotEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains FirstAxis
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "No virtual-to-physical interaction; digital shadow operates as a passive entity with one-way data flow only from physical to virtual."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization with live data streams; no specific frequency mentioned."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Digital shadow integrating SysML structural models, Simulink simulation models, live sensor data via MQTT, and a unified dashboard for friction analysis and visualization."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operational phase (as operated), utilizing live data during robot operation for friction analysis."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Validation through comparison of simulated versus measured data; parameters derived from manufacturer specifications; no explicit uncertainty quantification methods detailed."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for streaming sensor data from physical robot to digital shadow."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells (AAS) for interoperability; no specific external systems integration detailed."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "SysML modeling standard and Asset Administration Shells (AAS) within Industry 4.0 framework."
]
